offensive.name: ATK
offensive.description: Increases flat physical or magic attack power.

offensive.name: Crit Chance
offensive.description: Increases chance to land a critical strike.

offensive.name: Crit Damage
offensive.description: Increases damage multiplier of critical strikes.

offensive.name: Armor Penetration
offensive.description: Bypasses a portion of the target's physical defense.

offensive.name: Attack Speed
offensive.description: Increases basic attack or casting frequency.

defensive.name: Magic Resist
defensive.description: Reduces incoming magical and elemental damage.

defensive.name: Dodge
defensive.description: Chance to completely evade standard physical strikes.

defensive.name: Block Chance
defensive.description: Chance to absorb incoming attacks with active shields.

resource.name: Mana Regeneration
resource.description: Sustains casting by regenerating mana over time.

resource.name: HP Regeneration
resource.description: Restores health over time outside of active healing.

resource.name: Cooldown Reduction
resource.description: Reduces reactivation time on all spell and physical skills.
